o1.pros: Helps to track and align with partner on their count of users with cdg engie
o1.cons: Might need to regularly enter form to check on new registrations
o1.mitigations: To have either email notification or some form of automated pop up to notify sales support to onboard users

o2.pros: Mass uploading user details takes lesser time than individually whitelisting users one by one at different times
o2.cons: Dummy accounts may be used across different users as it is tagged to car plates. Might not be able to fully understand the charging pattern/behaviors of individual users

o3.cons: Unable to tap onto certain chargers
o3.mitigations: To possibly find ways to eliminate RFID cards in the near future and direct all partners and users to use the app
